---
title: "Link-in-bio"
---

---

CS student focused on systems, mathematics, and structured knowledge work.

Currently building personal knowledge infrastructure.

---

## Core Presence

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Facebook](https://facebook.com/shun.yamaguchi.social){target="_blank"}
Social Identity
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/network.shunyamaguchi.com){target="_blank"}
Public Network in AP Protocol
:::

:::

---

## Work / Proof

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shunyamaguchi)
Career Profile
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-1186-2126){target=_blank}
Academic Identity
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### [GitHub](https://github.com/shun-yamaguchi-dev){target="_blank"}
Engineer Identity
:::

<!--
::: {.g-col-6}
### [TopCoder](https://profiles.topcoder.com/shun.dev){target="_blank"}
Competitive Programming
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Codeforces](https://codeforces.com/profile/shuny){target="_blank"}
Problem Solving
:::
-->

:::

---

## Writing

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### Notes
Technical Knowledge Base
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Blog
Long-Term Writing
:::

:::

---

## Navigation

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Resume](resume.qmd)
Professional Backgrounds (Coming soon...)

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Portfolio](portfolio.qmd)
Collection of Works (Coming soon...)
:::

:::

---
